category_sources: source_facts.description says ImageMagick provides tools and libraries to manipulate images; official homepage describes a suite for editing and manipulating digital images.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the ImageMagick product name; source_facts.name provides the package identifier imagemagick.
docs_sources: Official ImageMagick site provides dedicated command-line tools and command-line processing documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ImageMagick CLI tools; official homepage and docs describe image manipulation, conversion, command-line tools, and APIs.
